# SafeClaw Services

Route all API calls through `{{PROXY_BASE}}`. Do NOT call upstream APIs directly.
SafeClaw auto-injects credentials (API key / OAuth2 token) before forwarding — do NOT add Authorization headers.

## Services
{{SERVICE_TABLE}}

## Example
```bash
# Via SafeClaw proxy (no auth header needed):
curl -X POST {{PROXY_BASE}}/openai/v1/chat/completions \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"model":"gpt-4o","messages":[...]}'
```
